note: protein-Ser/Thr (phosphoprotein) phosphatase; covers CTD/FCP-SCP Ser phosphatases (verify at build)
protein-histidine phosphatase (PHPT1); EC class 3.9 (P-N bonds), outside 3.1.3 (named exception)
PIP3 3-phosphatase (PTEN lipid leg; PTEN is dual via its protein ECs 3.1.3.16/48)
inorganic pyrophosphatase (LHPP); EC class 3.6.1, outside 3.1.3; dual protein-His capability via GO (gate-decided)
PSPH name-trap: acts on FREE O-phospho-L-serine (Ser biosynthesis, HAD), not a protein residue; exclude from ALL counts
